text: Employees must follow ethical standards and behave professionally at all times.
label: code_of_conduct

text: Violations of conduct rules may result in disciplinary action.
label: code_of_conduct

text: Harassment of any kind is not tolerated and will be investigated.
label: anti_harassment

text: We provide equal opportunity and do not discriminate based on protected characteristics.
label: anti_harassment

text: Paid time off (PTO) includes vacation and sick leave.
label: leave_policy

text: Employees should request leave in advance whenever possible.
label: leave_policy

text: Working hours are 9am to 5pm and attendance is required.
label: working_hours

text: Employees must record time accurately using the timekeeping system.
label: working_hours

text: Disciplinary action may include warnings, suspension, or termination.
label: disciplinary_action

text: Repeated violations can lead to corrective action and termination.
label: disciplinary_action
